CIP-0: Certified Innovation Professional Level 0: Innovation Champion Professionals take their first structured step into innovation, learning its core tools and mindset
CIP-1: Certified Innovation Professional Level 1: Associate Professionals learn to generate and apply breakthrough ideas , the only innovation management course accredited as 17024
CIP-2: Certified Innovation Professional Level 2: Master Candidates prove mastery by applying Level 1 tools to a real growth challenge in their organisation Prerequisite: CIP-1
CIP-MC: CIP Masterclass A live cohort fast-tracks working professionals to CIP certification, the only innovation management course accredited as 17024
CCIO-1: Certified Chief Innovation Officer Level 3: Manager Leaders learn to manage innovation end-to-end across the organisation
CCIO-2: Certified Chief Innovation Officer Level 4: Leader Leaders build the capability to design and run an enterprise-wide innovation ecosystem Prerequisite: CCIO-1
CCIO-MC: CCIO Masterclass Senior leaders earn the premier executive designation for driving organisational innovation
CGIS-1: Certified GIMI Impact: Students High-school students learn to think more innovatively and solve problems with empathy
CGIT: Certified GIMI Impact: Teachers Teachers gain the tools to instil an innovation mindset in their students
CGT: Certified GIMI Trainer Experienced innovators become certified to train and develop others Prerequisite: CIP-1, CIP-2, CCIO-1
IP: Innovation Primer Anyone can shift from passively watching change to proactively driving value
PBCC: Problem Solving Certified Catalyst Practitioners master a repeatable five-step method to turn problems into breakthrough ideas
CDT-1: Certified Design Thinking: Level 1 Professionals build human-centred design skills through the Immerse, Invent, Implement method
CDT-2: Certified Design Thinking: Level 2 Practitioners apply Design Thinking methods to a real organisational challenge Prerequisite: CDT-1
CDTT-3: Certified Design Thinking Trainer Certified designers earn the credentials to train others in human-centred design Prerequisite: CDT-1, CDT-2
CAAP: Certified AI Agent Practitioner Practitioners learn to operationalise AI by building a working agent through Innovation 5.0
CGA: Certified GIMI Auditor Professionals gain the skills to audit innovation management systems against ISO 56001 Prerequisite: CCIO-1
CIME: Certified ISO Innovation Management Expert Experts learn to establish and improve innovation management systems across the ISO 56000 family
CTC: Certified Technology Catalyst Leaders learn to turn 130+ breakthrough technologies into future-ready strategies
CLC: Certified Longevity Catalyst Leaders prepare to drive the shift from an aging society to a longevity society
CFF-1: Certified Foresight Professional: Level 1 Professionals sharpen the analytical skills to question assumptions and read weak signals
CFF-2: Certified Foresight Leader: Level 2 Leaders master the S4 Futures framework for rigorous, structured scenario work Prerequisite: CFF-1
CFF-3: Certified Foresight Officer: Level 3 Officers develop the capability to lead a full foresight project for a real organisation Prerequisite: CFF-2
CFF-4: Certified Trainer In Future Foresight Level 1 Foresight professionals become certified to train others at Level 1 Prerequisite: CFF-1
CFF-5: Certified Trainer In Future Foresight Level 2 Foresight leaders become certified to train others at advanced Level 2 Prerequisite: CFF-2
CLF-1: Certified Leader for the Future Leaders develop collaborative leadership powered by the Powers of AND
CIL: Certified Innovation Leader Leaders turn innovation into a repeatable competency through the SCD framework
MCI-1: Certified Management Consulting Level 1: Analyst Professionals build a solid grounding in the fundamentals of management consulting
MCI-2: Certified Management Consulting Level 2: Consultant Consultants apply the fundamentals to real-world client projects Prerequisite: MCI-1
MCI-3: Certified Management Consulting Level 3: Manager Managers learn to bridge strategy and execution with the REALIZE methodology Prerequisite: MCI-2
MCI-4: Certified Management Consulting Level 4: Leader Leaders develop visionary leadership and advanced strategy execution Prerequisite: MCI-3
